comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (Moderato con spirito) + Refrain (p-mf spiritedly). Pipeline has two total lyric gaps (m33: 3n, m34: 2n) plus OCR garble and syllable-split errors. m17 'fun.' lost (pipeline 0n 1r -- note lost, unfixable).

5.comment: Pipeline read 'th' + 'ers' instead of 'oth' + 'ers'. Published: 'There are oth - ers'.

6.comment: Pipeline read 'plea.' with spurious period. Published: 'who get plea - sure'.

14.comment: Pipeline had 'love to pun, the But' -- word order garbled. Published: 'love to pun, But the'.

24.comment: Pipeline had 'crime' missing comma. Published: 'crime,' with comma.

31.comment: Pipeline had 'Chuck knuck le, nick el, fick le,' -- dropped '-le,' after 'Chuck' and shifted all subsequent syllables. Published: 'Chuck - le, knuck - le, nick - el, fick - le,' (8 syllables). Pipeline only has 7n so best fit is 7 syllables.

32.comment: Pipeline had only 'le' on 4 notes. Published: 'le, pick - le!' then rest. 4n but only 3 syllables sung.

33.comment: GAP: Pipeline has 3 notes but NO LYRICS. Published: 'I love to'.

34.comment: GAP: Pipeline has 2 notes but NO LYRICS. Published: 'rhyme!' on note 1, then 'Va-' pickup on note 2.

36.comment: Pipeline had 'Theres' missing apostrophe. Published: 'There's no'. 5n with 'pri e ty,' from previous word completing, then 'There's no'.

37.comment: Pipeline had 'stop ping When you've' -- 'When' should be lowercase. Published: 'stop - ping when you've'.

38.comment: Pipeline had 'gun; Ca,' with spurious comma. Published: 'gun;' then 'Ca -' (start of Ca-pac-i-ty).

39.comment: Pipeline had 'a.u' as last token -- OCR garble. Published: 'pac - i - ty, ve - rac - i - ty, au -'.

43.comment: Pipeline had only 2 lyrics ('love to') on 3 notes. Published: 'love to rhyme,' -- missing 'rhyme,'.

45.comment: Pipeline had 'would it be sub' missing contraction. Published: 'would - n't it be sub -'. 4n + 1r; 4 syllables on 4 notes.
